home.description: Frontend-focused software developer building fast, intuitive web experiences. Driven by clean code, performance, and the details that make interfaces feel right.

about.title: About Me
about.description: I started in development out of curiosity and found in frontend the balance between logic and user experience. Today, my focus is on understanding and building software beyond the interface.
about.subtitle: What I’ve worked with:
about.ending: Outside of coding, I enjoy video games (especially Minecraft), building hardware like custom keyboards and PCs, and playing chess.

description: Designed and developed multiple React applications used by thousands of collaborators within the corporate ecosystem.
Collaborated with backend, design, and product teams to implement new features and improve user experience.
Elevated the visual quality of products through design systems and optimized application performance.
Developed a full e-commerce application using React, Java, and MySQL as a final project, demonstrating skills in both frontend and backend.
Built RESTful APIs with Java Spring Boot to handle business logic and data persistence.
Implemented agile methodology in group projects, effectively collaborating with peers to deliver high-quality software solutions.
Coordinated a development team as Project Manager, ensuring timely delivery of projects and maintaining effective communication among team members.
Developed multiple video games, from conceptualization to implementation, using Unity and C#.
